keywords.note: schema-level language map; NOT the @context multi-mapping notation
schema-level language map; NOT the @context multi-mapping notation
examples: {"en":"A distinct part of the world, such as a state, nation, or other political entity","de":"Ein bestimmter Teil der Welt, z. B. ein Staat, eine Nation oder eine andere politische Einheit"}
@manager: {"en":"The rector or president is the head of the university.","de":"Der/die Rektor:in oder Präsident:in ist der/die Leiter:in der Universität."}

keywords.note: root array is extend-only under composition (can add, cannot switch off); per-property boolean is overridable (most-derived-wins)
IRI / array of IRIs / OO-LD subschema
value source is an SMW query -> x-osl-query

json-editor watch ref. $anchor gives real reference semantics (unique per resource, name-pattern, referenceable via $ref) - couples UI to validation; vendor x-jedison-id avoids that. Prefer vendor unless watch-by-anchor is intended.
disabled / commented-out in source; not an active keyword

examples: @iso_8601_representation: "P{{#if year}}{{{year}}}Y{{/if}}{{#if month}}{{{month}}}M{{/if}}{{#if day}}{{{day}}}D{{/if}}{{#if (calc year '+' (calc month '+' day))}}{{#unless (calc hour '+' (calc minute '+' second ))}}{{/unles...

examples: @characteristics: "A human has a physical dimension without beeing a physical dimension"
